summary: Remove unused cliutil imports and empty stdin-body guards from two generated ClickHouse Cloud mutation commands.
reason: The ClickHouse Cloud spec has body fields that do not need cliutil helpers in these two commands. The generated imports made the package fail to compile before validation could complete.
validated_outcome: Focused source inspection confirmed the commands only need encoding/json, fmt, io, os, and cobra; gofmt was run after removing the unused imports and no-op guards.
